channel.title: Decompiler on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Decompiler on Pi Stack

item.title: Ghidra vs Radare2 vs Rizin: Best Self-Hosted Binary Analysis & Reverse Engineering Tools (2026)
item.description: Reverse engineering and binary analysis are essential skills for security researchers, malware analysts, and software developers who need to understand how compiled programs work. Whether you are auditing a third-party library, investigating a suspicious binary, or debugging a legacy system without source code, having the right tools makes all the difference.
